title: Raislerk
compiled_truth: Raislerk is an external contact at [Sullcrom](companies/sullcrom). Over the corpus period (1999-05-20 to 2001-10-24), Raislerk sent 34 and received 155 emails, totalling 189 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (25), [Mcadammj](people/mcadammj-bp) (18), [Lanced](people/lanced-kochind) (18), [Schindlg](people/schindlg-phibro) (18), [Goetscrj](people/goetscrj-bp) (17).
